yearSwitcher.bannerText: Companies are shared across all years. Subscriptions, assignments and the program schedule are scoped to the selected year — switching the year will change those datasets.
yearSwitcher.bannerLink: What changes when I switch the year?
yearSwitcher.modalIntro: Are you sure you want to switch the admin view to {{year}}? The following data will update to reflect the selected year:

willChange.subscriptionsDesc: registrations and meal/coin selections for that event year
willChange.assignmentsDesc: booth assignments and marker-to-company mappings for that year
willChange.programDesc: the schedule / activities for the selected year

yearSwitcher.wontChangeIntro: The following data is not affected when switching years:

wontChange.companiesDesc: company profiles and master data are global and shared across years

errors.updateFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.

mapManagement.title: Map Management
mapManagement.defaultAppearanceAssigned: This defines the default appearance for booth markers (ID < 1000) that have a company assigned.
mapManagement.defaultAppearanceUnassigned: This defines the default appearance for booth markers (ID < 1000) that have no company assigned.
mapManagement.overrideDefaultsNote: Individual booth markers can override these defaults by having their own values in the Appearance table.

programManagement.title: Program Management
programManagement.noActivitiesFound: No activities found for this day
programManagement.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this activity? This action cannot be undone.

activityForm.displayOrderHelp: Lower numbers appear first in the schedule
activityForm.companyScopeHint: Companies are shared across all years — selecting a company links the activity to that company across events.
activityForm.isActiveHelp: Inactive activities won't be shown to visitors
activityForm.savePersistMismatch: Saved but the badge value wasn't applied — you may not have permission to change this. Please check your role or contact an administrator.

dashboard.addNewCompanyDesc: Register a new company in the system
dashboard.mapManagementDesc: Manage map markers and booth locations
dashboard.recentActivityPlaceholder: Activity tracking will be added in a future update.
dashboard.liveOverviewDesc: Real-time visitors connected to the map

checklist.title: Critical Pre-Event Action Required
checklist.warningDesc: We expect over 5000 visitors during the event weekend. The application is currently running on the Supabase Free Tier, which is strictly limited to 500 concurrent real-time connections.
checklist.crashWarning: If the database is not upgraded before the event, the map will crash when visitors try to load it.
checklist.upgradeDesc: Upgrade the project to allow for thousands of simultaneous connections. Review quotas for Realtime connections and Data Egress.
checklist.lockMapDesc: To prevent accidental live updates while the event is ongoing, lock the map UI in the admin panel so no booths or markers can be moved.
checklist.verifyBackupsDesc: Confirm that the cron jobs are running successfully and the latest full database backups are stored safely off-site (Dropbox/Drive).
checklist.checkPerfDesc: Ensure PWA limits and caching are functioning so map tiles load quickly for users with poor cellular reception at the event.

helpPanel.title: Help & Guide
helpPanel.interactiveTourSubtitle: Step-by-step guided tours to help you learn the application
helpPanel.quickStartSubtitle: Get started with the admin panel

steps.step1Text: Your role ({role}) determines which features you can access. Check the navigation menu to see available sections.
steps.step2Text: Use the year dropdown in the top navigation to switch between different event years. All data (subscriptions, assignments) is year-specific.
steps.step3Text: Start at the Dashboard to see an overview of markers, companies, and event statistics. This gives you a quick snapshot of your current data.
steps.step4Item1: Add companies in the Companies tab
steps.step5Text: Click "Current Page" tab in this help panel to see specific guidance for each section. Hover over (?) icons for quick tooltips.

helpPanel.footer: Need more help? Contact your system administrator

tour.noToursAvailable: No tours available for your current page
tour.navigationRequiredText: To run the tour we need to navigate to {{page}}. Do you want to continue?
tour.startFailed: Could not start the tour — required page elements are missing or the page is loading. Try again after navigation or check the current page.

subscriptionAlreadyExistsForYear:
A subscription for "{{companyName}}" already exists for {{year}} (booths: {{booths}}).

Merge will add this item's counts to the existing subscription.
Replace will overwrite it completely with this item.
subscriptionAlreadyExistsForCompany:
A subscription for "{{companyName}}" already exists for {{year}} (booths: {{booths}}).

Merging will add counts from this invoice to the existing subscription.
Replacing will overwrite it completely.
